name: Fasting-mimicking diet protein-content randomized study
summary: A 7-day randomized parallel-group study comparing low-protein and high-protein fasting-mimicking diet variants with a non-intervention comparator.

trial_details.horizon_note: Results are already in the public evidence layer, so this is not an open no-result watch item.
trial_details.why_it_matters: Results matter for Autophagy Induction because they can show whether the intervention changes biomarkers, mechanistic endpoints, and function in Healthy adult men and women. That is still narrower than proof of broad aging reversal.
